ai.error: OPENAI_API_KEY or LLM_MODEL is not configured

{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [], "credits_detailed": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45691", "cvss": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-287"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-287", "name": "Improper Authentication"}], "description": "### Impact

A pre-2FA session cookie (created after successful password authentication but before TOTP completion) could be reused as a Bearer token to authenticate against DAV endpoints, granting read/write access and bypassing mandatory two-factor authentication.

### Patches

It is recommended that the Nextcloud Server is upgraded to 33.0.3 or 32.0.9
It is recommended that the Nextcloud Enterprise Server is upgraded to 33.0.3, 32.0.9, 31.0.14.5, 30.0.17.9 or 29.0.16.16

### Workarounds

<!-- Remove not applicable sections -->

* No workaround available

### References

<!-- Link to the main/master PR only -->

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3573399)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/server/pull/59758)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
* Customers: Open a support ticket at [portal.nextcloud.com](https://portal.nextcloud.com)

title: Bypass of second factor authentication on DAV endpoints by reusing a pre-2FA session ID
